title: Ahoy Design System from Teamleader
content: Ahoy from Directories: Components: Ahoy Design System enhances user experiences on the Teamleader platform. It encompasses design principles, guidelines, and components tailored for effective team management. Driven by accessibility and usability, Ahoy ensures seamless interactions for all users. It centralizes design assets and documentation, facilitating collaboration and maintaining consistency across projects. Accessibility Color System Figma Repository Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Responsive Spacing Storybook Typography Voice and Tone Action bar Alert banner Avatar Badges Button Cards Data table Date picker Dialog Empty state Filter input Label Menus Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Sidebar Snackbar Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
